_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py on the held-out test set, and benchmark_latency.py). Single source of truth: scripts/make_figures.py reads this file. Update it when a new run lands, then re-run scripts/build_all.sh.
best_config: per-sensor router: EVK4 -> cross-grid ensemble; DAVIS/DVX -> temporal-context CenterNet + TTA
latency_note: grid-128 CenterNet, laptop CPU, streaming (batch=1). Re-measure the deployed g192_ctx model on GPU with scripts/benchmark_latency.py.
